column1: #   - app0 (~5.6MB): firmware lives here. Current Pisces Moon
#     Comfortably accommodates the core app set plus MicroPython
#     and the ELF runtime. Doom and SimCity are excluded from the
#     Cardputer build (see CHANGELOG_v1_2_1.md) and would not fit
#     in the gamedata partition below anyway.
#   - gamedata (1.5MB FAT): internal flash for fast game asset
#     reads. Doom shareware WAD (4.2MB) does NOT fit — Doom is
#     compiled out of the Cardputer build. SimCity terrain data
#     does fit (~400KB) but the 320x240 game canvas doesn't crop

column2: so SimCity is also out. What

column1: #     manifests. Pisces Moon writes user data to SD by default;
#     SPIFFS is the emergency fallback when SD is absent. Sized
#     to fill remaining flash exactly — no wasted bytes.
# Total layout reaches 0x800000 (8MB) exactly. The 0x9000 region
# at the start is reserved for the second-stage bootloader.
